title: ValidationSummary
description: Summary of validation results for replay bundles.

valid_bundle_count.description: Number of replay bundles that passed validation.

invalid_bundle_count.description: Number of replay bundles that failed validation.

warning_count.description: Total number of validation warnings across all bundles.

error_count.description: Total number of validation errors across all bundles.

summary.description: A short narrative summary of the validation results.
